license.source: MediaPipe Face Landmarker (face_landmarks_detector.tflite, extracted from the official face_landmarker.task bundle)
license.note: Apache 2.0. Model weights and code. Commercial use permitted. https://github.com/google/mediapipe and https://www.kaggle.com/models/mediapipe/face-landmarks-detection (model card confirms Apache 2.0). Extracted via `unzip face_landmarker.task` — the .task container is a zip archive bundling face_detector.tflite + face_landmarks_detector.tflite + face_blendshapes.tflite + geometry metadata; only face_landmarks_detector.tflite is used here (renamed face_landmark_478.tflite) since detection is already covered by blazeface_short and blendshapes/geometry are unused by this SDK.
